mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follows WHERE follower = #{userId1} AND followed = #{userId2}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follows WHERE follower = #{userId2} AND followed = #{userId1}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower = #{follower} AND followed = #{followed}
mapper.select: SELECT f.follow_id, f.follower AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS profile_image, f.created_at AS followed_at FROM follows f JOIN users u ON f.follower = u.user_id WHERE f.followed = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.follow_id, f.followed AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS profile_image, f.created_at AS followed_at FROM follows f JOIN users u ON f.followed = u.user_id WHERE f.follower = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
